message.content:
You are testing the "profile" step of the libnn optimization FSM. This step runs the AndesCycle (vsim) pipeline simulator to get function-level cycle breakdown and pipeline analysis.

Working directory: /home/nick/work/libnn

## What to do

The test binary and objdump should already exist from the measure step. Check and run these commands, reporting ALL output:

### 1. Check files exist
```bash
ls -la /home/nick/work/libnn/qemu-validate/work/t_conv_dw_HWC_s8_s8_s8_sym_bias_any_perf.adx
ls -la /home/nick/work/libnn/qemu-validate/work/t_conv_dw_HWC_s8_s8_s8_sym_bias_any_perf.objdump
```

If the objdump doesn't exist, generate it:
```bash
export PATH="/local/nick/SW_Release_cp/ast530/nds64le-elf-newlib-v5d/bin:$PATH"
riscv64-elf-objdump -d /home/nick/work/libnn/qemu-validate/work/t_conv_dw_HWC_s8_s8_s8_sym_bias_any_perf.adx > /home/nick/work/libnn/qemu-validate/work/t_conv_dw_HWC_s8_s8_s8_sym_bias_any_perf.objdump
```

### 2. Run vsim quick simulation with function trace
```bash
/local/nick/vsim-workspace/vsim/build/sim_ax45mpv_premium \
  /home/nick/work/libnn/qemu-validate/work/t_conv_dw_HWC_s8_s8_s8_sym_bias_any_perf.adx \
  --log-level 0 2>&1 \
  | python3 /local/nick/vsim-workspace/vsim/tools/functrace.py \
    /home/nick/work/libnn/qemu-validate/work/t_conv_dw_HWC_s8_s8_s8_sym_bias_any_perf.objdump
```

### 3. Run konata pipeline analysis
```bash
ln -sfn /local/nick/vsim-workspace/vsim/tools /tmp/vsim

PYTHONPATH=/tmp python3 /local/nick/vsim-workspace/vsim/tools/konata.py \
  --cpu ax45mpv_premium \
  --objdump-file /home/nick/work/libnn/qemu-validate/work/t_conv_dw_HWC_s8_s8_s8_sym_bias_any_perf.objdump \
  --output /home/nick/work/libnn/qemu-validate/work/kanata_conv_dw.log \
  --experimental \
  /home/nick/work/libnn/qemu-validate/work/t_conv_dw_HWC_s8_s8_s8_sym_bias_any_perf.adx
```

### 4. If konata log was generated, show just the first 50 lines to verify format

## IMPORTANT
- Report ALL output including errors
- If vsim binary doesn't exist or fails, report exactly what happened
- If python module is missing, report the import error
- The vsim simulation may take a while — use a 300 second timeout
- Do NOT try to fix errors — just report them

content.text: I'll check the files and run each step, reporting all output.
